posts.author: DannyP (Danny P)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Does anyone have any workarounds for displaying gauge style charts in Monday?

Their primary function is to track distance to target, with the colour changing depending on how close they are.

We have these in our more detailed Zoho Analytics reporting (example below).

Alternatively I might just have to resort to embedding them into a dashboard straight from Zoho.

Thanks,

posts.author: sescott (Steve Escott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Danny!
My company AllDayIT Ltd. Just released Speedometer in the Marketplace on Dec. 15!
Feel free to give it a spin, and provide any feedback.
All the best!
Steve Escott
